                "communicationTips": "[{\"header\":\"When communicating with me, an Advocate, DO:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Build a favorable, friendly environment; allow for social  activities\"},{\"value\":\"Give opportunity for them to verbalize about ideas, people and their intuition\"},{\"value\":\"Give adequate information for informed decisions\"},{\"value\":\"Share testimonials from others relating to proposed ideas\"},{\"value\":\"Develop a team atmosphere and participative relationship\"},{\"value\":\"Create incentives for their quality workk\"},{\"value\":\"TESTING...\"}]},{\"header\":\"When communicating with me, an Advocate, DO NOT:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Be overly aggressive\"},{\"value\":\"Make them harshly discipline peers\"},{\"value\":\"Threaten their sense of security\"},{\"value\":\"Be overly critical\"}]},{\"header\":\"Value to a team:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Steady, hard worker, analytical\"},{\"value\":\"Motivates others to achieve by aiding and assisting\"},{\"value\":\"Good leader if parameters are clearly defined\"},{\"value\":\"Very relational and approachable\"}]},{\"header\":\"Personal growth areas:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Be open and participative\"},{\"value\":\"Believe in yourself and your leadership abilities\"},{\"value\":\"Delegate more\"},{\"value\":\"Do not take criticism personally\"},{\"value\":\"Stand up to those with more dominant personalities when necessary\"},{\"value\":\"May be overly protective of relationships\"}]}]",

                "peopleKeysAccountID": 185,
                "personID": 1960713,
                "lessonID": 0,
                "communicationTips": "[{\"header\":\"When communicating with me, a Peacemaker, DO:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Create a favorable environment that is personal and agreeable\"},{\"value\":\"Express a genuine interest in them as a person\"},{\"value\":\"Provide them with clarification for tasks and answers to \\\"how\\\" questions\"},{\"value\":\"Be patient and give them follow-up support\"},{\"value\":\"Present ideas or departures from current practices in a non-threatening manner; give them time to adjust\"},{\"value\":\"Clearly define goals, procedures and their role in the overall plan\"}]},{\"header\":\"When communicating with me, a Peacemaker, DO NOT:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Be pushy, overly aggressive, or demanding\"},{\"value\":\"Expect them to make decisions without all the information\"},{\"value\":\"Ask them to discipline others or put them in competitive environments\"},{\"value\":\"Be too confrontational or critical of their actions\"}]},{\"header\":\"Value to a team:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Reliable, steady and loyal team member\"},{\"value\":\"Compliant towards authority\"},{\"value\":\"Good listener, patient and empathetic\"},{\"value\":\"Will follow a task through from start to finish\"}]},{\"header\":\"Personal growth areas:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Be more open to change, develop more flexibility\"},{\"value\":\"Be more direct in your interactions\"},{\"value\":\"Focus on overall goals of the team rather than specific procedures\"},{\"value\":\"Deal with confrontation constructively\"},{\"value\":\"Increase pace to accomplish goals\"},{\"value\":\"Show more initiative\"}]}]",

                "communicationTips": "[{\"header\":\"When communicating with me, a Contemplator, DO:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Provide information to back up statements\"},{\"value\":\"Offer sincere appreciation for their efforts\"},{\"value\":\"Focus on business; remember they desire results\"},{\"value\":\"Be loyal\"},{\"value\":\"Give them all the information they need\"},{\"value\":\"Give them ample time to respond\"},{\"value\":\"Recognize their high quality work\"}]},{\"header\":\"When communicating with me, a Contemplator, DO NOT:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Do all the talking\"},{\"value\":\"Focus on problems\"},{\"value\":\"Criticize or challenge them directly\"},{\"value\":\"Make generalizations or statements without support\"}]},{\"header\":\"Value to a team:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Values team working together to achieve results\"},{\"value\":\"Steady; not overly impulsive\"},{\"value\":\"Promotes high quality work and results\"},{\"value\":\"Good follow through and completion\"}]},{\"header\":\"Personal growth areas:\",\"items\":[{\"value\":\"Strive to be an encourager to others\"},{\"value\":\"Be more expressive of feelings\"},{\"value\":\"Be less controlling and directive\"},{\"value\":\"Develop a greater appreciation for the opinions, feelings and desires of others\"},{\"value\":\"Let others feel more a part of the team\"},{\"value\":\"Share information with others\"}]}]",
